task.title: Split OpenClaw into static route and SSR invite route; update SKILL.md URLs

events.content: Split /openclaw into cached static route and separate SSR invite route: Split /openclaw into cached static route and separate SSR invite route

raw.question: Split /openclaw into cached static route and separate SSR invite route
raw.chosen: Split /openclaw into cached static route and separate SSR invite route
raw.reasoning: Static content should be CDN-friendly while invite-token pages require per-request server rendering with explicit token instructions

events.content: Switch invite URLs from query param to path segment: Switch invite URLs from query param to path segment

raw.question: Switch invite URLs from query param to path segment
raw.chosen: Switch invite URLs from query param to path segment
raw.reasoning: Path-based invite route cleanly maps to dedicated Lambda rendering and keeps static /openclaw route cacheable

retrospective.summary: Implemented split routing: StaticSite at /openclaw and SSR Lambda at /openclaw/invite/<token>; updated OpenClaw SKILL invite URLs to path format and added static build script from SKILL.md.
